global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with gameplay elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to level up and play with friends.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font in white against the purple background.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area shows a gameplay screenshot with four game icons arranged in a grid, each with a small dot indicating interaction.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four game icons are displayed in a grid format, each outlined in white with a dark circle in the center.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Another set of four game icons is shown below the first, maintaining the same grid layout and design.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area shows another gameplay screenshot with similar game icons and interaction dots.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small white arrow icon pointing to the right is positioned at the top right, suggesting navigation.

elements.label: Small dot
elements.description: A small dark dot is placed in the upper section, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: Small dot
elements.description: Another small dark dot is positioned near the top left, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Level up today Play with friends tonight' is prominently displayed in white, conveying the main message of the ad.

elements.label: Sub-message
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message reinforces the call to action, also in white.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in bold white font, inviting immediate action.
elements.text_content: Level up today Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The headline 'Level up today' is bold and eye-catching, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Order now' is displayed in a button format, encouraging users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and playful, PixelForge logo, gameplay screenshots, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by gameplay screenshots and the main message in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Level up today, Play with friends tonight, PixelForge, Order now
